task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a Daily chart for SPY with a 14-period RSI indicator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window with 'SPY' and 'Day' or 'D' in the header/title. A sub-panel below the price chart must display the RSI indicator with the parameter '14' visible (e.g., 'RSI (14)').

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a Weekly chart for SPY with a MACD (12, 26, 9) indicator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window with 'SPY' and 'Week' or 'W' in the header/title. A sub-panel below the price chart must display the MACD indicator with the parameters '12, 26, 9' visible (e.g., 'MACD (12, 26, 9)').

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a Monthly chart for SPY with a 10-period SMA indicator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window with 'SPY' and 'Month' or 'MO' in the header/title. The main price chart must have a moving average line overlay with the parameter '10' visible in the indicator label (e.g., 'SMA (10)').

task_completion.description: Verify that all three specified charts (Daily, Weekly, Monthly) are open at the same time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A single screenshot showing all three distinct SPY chart windows (Daily, Weekly, and Monthly) open and visible simultaneously on the desktop.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workspace configuration has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Interaction with the 'Workspaces' menu in the Control Center showing a 'Save' or 'Save Workspace' action being clicked, or the active workspace name in the Control Center appearing without an asterisk (which would indicate unsaved changes).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the charts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show NinjaTrader 8 dialog boxes (like 'Data Series' or 'Indicators') and menu interactions, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the charts are displaying actual historical data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart windows must display actual price candlesticks or bars for SPY, not empty grids or 'Waiting for data' messages.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must match NinjaTrader 8's standard Control Center and chart window layouts, not a mock-up, image viewer, or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: NinjaTrader 8 uses 'D' or 'Day' for Daily, 'W' or 'Week' for Weekly, and 'MO' or 'Month' for Monthly timeframes. SPY is the State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF. The standard RSI period is 14, MACD parameters are (12, 26, 9), and SMA period is 10. In NinjaTrader 8, indicators display their parameters in the top-left of the chart panel or sub-panel (e.g., 'SMA (10)', 'RSI (14)', 'MACD (12, 26, 9)'). Workspaces are saved via the Control Center's 'Workspaces' menu; a saved active workspace typically appears without an asterisk.
